name: resize
description: Scale / resize the active object. x, y, z are MULTIPLIERS (1.0 = unchanged, 1.05 = +5%, 0.95 = -5%, 0.5 = half, 2.0 = double). TR: 'buyut/buyult' = enlarge, 'kucult' = shrink, 'yuzde N buyult' -> 1 + N/100, 'yuzde N kucult' -> 1 - N/100, 'N kat/katina' -> N. EN: 'scale up/down by N percent', 'N times'. Map width/genislik -> x, depth/derinlik -> y, height/yukseklik -> z; if no axis is named, apply the same multiplier to x, y and z.
